summary: Iteration 3 testing - Production fix verification: Pure Three.js solar system, SpaceEventModal, timeline emoji removal, astrology emoji fix. All critical fixes verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: All fixes verified: Pure Three.js solar system renders with 7 planet buttons + info panel, SpaceEventModal opens on card click with Tamil title/description/image/agency/status, /api/timeline returns 25 events with NO icon field, /api/space/past returns 20 events, /api/objects returns 16 objects, astrology form submits and shows results with Kundali export button - no zodiac emojis found
context_for_next_testing_agent: All production fixes verified working: (1) 3D Solar System - pure Three.js canvas renders, 7 planet buttons (சூரியன், புதன், வெள்ளி, பூமி, செவ்வாய், வியாழன், சனி), planet click shows info panel, LIVE/DEMO mode toggle works. (2) SpaceSection - Past/Present/Future tabs work, 20 space cards in Past tab, clicking card opens SpaceEventModal with full details. (3) Timeline - /api/timeline returns events without icon field (25 events). (4) Astrology - form fills, calculates results (Rasi=மீனம், Nakshatra=கார்த்திகை, Lagna=கடகம்), Kundali export button visible. No R3F/console errors observed.
rca_of_issue: Previous R3F (@react-three/fiber) caused React 19 dev mode error 'Cannot set x-line-number'. Fixed by reverting to pure Three.js. SpaceSection cards were missing onClick handler. Timeline seed data had icon field with emoji characters - removed from seed and migration removes from MongoDB on startup. AstrologyCalculator empty state used ♈ zodiac emoji - replaced with geometric CSS circles.
